description.value: This spell functions as magic mouth, except rather than creating an illusory mouth on any surface, it affects a skull. In addition, when the skullâs magic is triggered, it releases wild and unnerving cackles before speaking its message. All creatures that can hear the cackles must save or become shaken for 1d4 rounds. Section 15: Copyright Notice Pathfinder Roleplaying Game: Ultimate Magic.
